project.title: 微信树洞 AI
project.summary: 一个接入微信环境的 AI 陪聊智能体，像嘴欠但靠谱的深夜损友一样陪你和少数朋友吐槽、emo、睡前聊天，并通过公开样本蒸馏、表情包意图和短语音脚本增强真人感。
project.next_action_summary: Confirm Build Round 1 scope before implementation starts.
project.current_risk_summary: Round 1 avoids real WeChat and real media integration; API, rights, voice provider, and public-data license checks remain tracked for later steps.

phases.title: Intake and maturity assessment
phases.goal: 把早期想法整理成可推进的项目入口，明确项目类型、成熟度、风险和下一阶段。
phases.summary: 项目已判断为多平台产品，从想法输入进入蓝图阶段。
phases.notes: 当前没有现有代码或产品文档，按从 0 到 1 的产品启动处理。
phases.acceptance_hint: 项目类型、起点和主要风险已清楚列出。

phases.title: Product blueprint confirmation
phases.goal: 把产品定位、目标用户、核心场景、MVP 范围和非目标确认下来。
phases.summary: 用户已确认产品蓝图，并补充确认公开样本蒸馏与表情包/短语音真人感增强范围。
phases.notes: 人格、MVP 场景、用户范围、微信路线、公开样本路线和多模态真人感范围均已确认。
phases.acceptance_hint: 蓝图可以指导静态原型和后续技术规划。

phases.title: Web static prototype confirmation
phases.goal: 在正式编码前，用可查看的静态原型确认聊天体验、管理后台和主要页面结构。
phases.summary: Web 静态原型已由用户确认。
phases.notes: 原型确认后已进入架构规划。本轮已做静态文件检查；浏览器截图验证因工具入口不可用而未完成，但用户在应用内浏览器打开后确认。
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户应能看懂页面、入口、主要流程和信息摆放。

phases.title: Architecture and module-boundary planning
phases.goal: 把确认后的产品和原型翻译成稳定、可迭代的技术结构。
phases.summary: Architecture route confirmed by the user.
phases.notes: MVP route: modular monolith, background worker, and one database.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户应能理解每个模块为什么存在，以及它如何支撑产品稳定上线。

phases.title: Master task board generation
phases.goal: 把项目拆成可追踪的小步骤，并生成用户可读和机器可读的任务状态。
phases.summary: Master task board confirmed by the user.
phases.notes: Project moved to Build Round 1 scoping.
phases.acceptance_hint: The user should be able to see total steps, completed steps, and each step output.

phases.title: Build-round scoping
phases.goal: 在每轮开发前明确本轮做什么、不做什么、完成后用户能验证什么。
phases.summary: Build Round 1 scope drafted and waiting for confirmation.
phases.notes: Recommended Round 1 is a local companion simulator and admin foundation.
phases.acceptance_hint: The user can confirm the first implementation slice.

phases.title: Development progress orchestration
phases.goal: 按已确认的任务板推进开发，并用产品语言持续报告进展。
phases.notes: Development waits for master board and build round scope confirmation.
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能看到每个开发步骤完成了什么产物。

phases.title: User test intervention guidance
phases.goal: 在可运行版本完成后，引导用户测试核心流程。
phases.notes: 只有构建可运行后才邀请用户测试。
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户能按清单验证真实聊天流程。

phases.title: User-level test documentation
phases.goal: 生成非技术用户也能执行的测试说明。
phases.acceptance_hint: 测试用例应包含目标、前置条件、步骤、预期结果和失败反馈方式。

phases.title: Debug collaboration
phases.goal: 当内测发现问题时，用结构化反馈转成下一步修复行动。
phases.notes: 只有测试发现问题后进入。
phases.acceptance_hint: 用户不需要懂技术，也能清楚报告问题。

phases.title: Delivery and handoff
phases.goal: 整理交付内容、已知问题和下一轮建议。
phases.notes: 需要等待构建、测试和修复完成。
phases.acceptance_hint: 交付摘要应清楚说明源码、文档、架构、核心流程和下一步。

steps.title: Explore project context
steps.goal: 确认当前目录中是否已有产品材料或代码，避免重复假设。
output: 当前目录无已有产品代码或文档；Git 尚无提交记录。
steps.notes: 按新项目启动。
steps.acceptance_hint: 工作区情况已明确。

steps.title: Create intake artifact
steps.goal: 形成项目启动说明和初始状态。
steps.notes: 项目类型为 multi-platform。
steps.acceptance_hint: 启动说明包含项目类型、成熟度和风险。

steps.title: Choose AI personality
steps.goal: 确定陪聊智能体给人的第一感受。
output: B + D: 嘴欠但靠谱的深夜损友
steps.notes: 人格同时包含毒舌损友和深夜陪伴。
steps.acceptance_hint: 人格方向清楚且可写入 prompt。

steps.title: Choose MVP anchor scenario
steps.goal: 避免第一版覆盖过宽，先找一个最能体现产品气质的主场景。
output: 生活压力、emo、睡前陪伴优先
steps.notes: 其他吐槽类型兼容，但不作为第一主轴。
steps.acceptance_hint: MVP 主场景已明确。

steps.title: Choose initial user scope
steps.goal: 明确第一版是自用、内测还是公开产品。
output: 你本人 + 少数朋友内测
steps.notes: 需要白名单、基础用户隔离和轻量管理后台。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户规模边界已明确。

steps.title: Choose WeChat route
steps.goal: 在体验、稳定性和合规风险之间选择第一版接入方式。
output: 企业微信/微信客服式入口
steps.notes: 不采用个人微信号自动化作为正式 MVP 路线。
steps.acceptance_hint: 接入路线已明确，可进入原型和架构。

steps.title: Consolidate product blueprint
steps.goal: 将已确认的选择整理成一份可执行产品蓝图。
steps.notes: 蓝图已被用户确认。
steps.acceptance_hint: 产品定义、目标用户、核心场景、MVP 范围和非目标都已写明。

steps.title: Write confirmed design spec
steps.goal: 保存一份可供后续原型、架构和任务拆分使用的确认版规格。
steps.notes: 已完成完整性和矛盾检查。
steps.acceptance_hint: 规格无未完成标记和明显矛盾。

steps.title: Confirm public sample distillation route
steps.goal: 降低用户手动整理私人聊天样本的负担，改用公开来源和合成样本提炼真人聊天行为。
steps.notes: 用户确认使用公开样本，表情包大文件等到关闭 VPN 后再下载。
steps.acceptance_hint: 公开来源、许可边界、下载策略和样本结构已写明。

steps.title: Define sticker and voice realism scope
steps.goal: 把表情包、短语音和真人感行为从口头想法变成可设计、可测试的产品范围。
steps.notes: MVP 先做表情包意图和短语音脚本，真实素材下载、版权和语音合成接入留到架构阶段确认。
steps.acceptance_hint: 真人感行为规则能指导原型页面和后续多模态架构。

steps.title: Confirm prototype review mode
steps.goal: 确认用户是否希望用浏览器可视化方式查看原型。
output: 用户明确要求进入 Web 静态原型阶段。
steps.notes: 用户已确认进入可视化原型阶段。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户确认是否要打开本地浏览器原型。

steps.title: Create screen map and screen specs
steps.goal: 列出原型需要包含的页面和每页信息重点。
steps.notes: 页面清单包括聊天体验、表情包与语音、用户与记忆、样本蒸馏、安全与运行。
steps.acceptance_hint: 页面清单能覆盖 MVP 主流程。

steps.title: Build web static prototype
steps.goal: 让用户能实际查看页面结构、主流程和信息层级。
steps.notes: 静态原型不需要真实后端。已做文件存在、交互选择器和响应式规则的静态检查；浏览器截图验证工具本轮不可用。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户能打开原型并判断页面和流程是否正确。

steps.title: Confirm static prototype
steps.goal: 在正式编码前确认页面、主流程和信息摆放。
output: 用户在应用内浏览器查看后回复“确认”。
steps.notes: 确认后才进入架构阶段。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户明确同意原型可以进入正式实现规划。

steps.title: Create architecture overview
steps.goal: 把确认后的产品和原型翻译成稳定、可迭代的整体系统结构。
steps.notes: 架构将微信、AI、多模态、记忆、安全、样本蒸馏和后台拆成清楚模块。
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户能理解系统主要部分如何协作。

steps.title: Define module boundaries
steps.goal: 明确各模块负责什么、不负责什么，降低后续开发混乱和返工。
steps.notes: 模块包括 WeChat Adapter、Message Inbox、Safety Guard、Memory、Orchestrator、Multimodal、Media、Distillation、Admin 和 Observability。
steps.acceptance_hint: 每个模块边界都能对应到产品稳定性或后续迭代速度。

steps.title: Choose implementation strategy
steps.goal: 在速度、稳定性、成本和未来扩展之间选择 MVP 技术路线。
steps.notes: User confirmed the modular monolith MVP route.
steps.acceptance_hint: 用户确认推荐路线后即可生成主任务板。

steps.title: Generate master task board
steps.goal: Split the full project into trackable steps.
steps.notes: Master board, progress board, and artifact registry created.
steps.acceptance_hint: The user can see total steps, completed steps, and outputs.

steps.title: Confirm master task board
steps.goal: Confirm the project split before implementation tracking starts.
output: User confirmed master task board in chat.
steps.notes: Confirmed by user.
steps.acceptance_hint: Project can move to Build Round 1 scoping.

steps.title: Scope build round 1
steps.goal: Define what build round 1 includes, excludes, and makes testable.
steps.notes: Scope document drafted for review.
steps.acceptance_hint: After confirmation, implementation starts with the project scaffold.
steps.progress_summary: Waiting for Build Round 1 scope confirmation.
blockers: Waiting for Build Round 1 scope confirmation

steps.title: Project scaffold
steps.goal: Create the runnable app foundation.
steps.notes: Expected output: backend, frontend, and base run command.
steps.acceptance_hint: Local app can start.

steps.title: Database schema
steps.goal: Create data structures for users, settings, memory, message metadata, and audit events.
steps.notes: Database must support inner test users and memory clearing.
steps.acceptance_hint: Schema or migrations can be verified.

steps.title: Admin console shell
steps.goal: Build the admin page shell from the confirmed prototype.
steps.notes: Build navigation and pages before real data wiring.
steps.acceptance_hint: Admin pages open and switch.

steps.title: Users and whitelist
steps.goal: Manage inner-test user access.
steps.notes: Support enabled, invited, and allowlisted states.
steps.acceptance_hint: User states can be created and updated.

steps.title: Conversation simulator
steps.goal: Test chat behavior without WeChat credentials.
steps.notes: Simulator verifies personality, memory, and multimodal decisions first.
steps.acceptance_hint: Local simulated chat works.

steps.title: Safety Guard
steps.goal: Detect high-risk content and disable jokes, stickers, and playful voice.
steps.notes: Safety must run before personality and multimodal decisions.
steps.acceptance_hint: High-risk tests switch to safety mode.

steps.title: Memory Service
steps.goal: Store limited preferences and support disabling or clearing.
steps.notes: Memory stores lightweight preferences only.
steps.acceptance_hint: Memory can save, read, and clear values.

steps.title: Orchestrator and personality
steps.goal: Generate the late-night friend response plan.
steps.notes: Combine safety, memory, personality, and model routing.
steps.acceptance_hint: Low-risk scenarios generate suitable response plans.

steps.title: Multimodal decision layer
steps.goal: Choose text, sticker intent, short voice script, or safety response.
steps.notes: Use intent and scripts first, not real assets.
steps.acceptance_hint: Prototype scenarios produce different response modes.

steps.title: Distillation source status
steps.goal: Expose public source, license, and download status.
steps.notes: Admin should show candidate, research-only, deferred, and method-reference sources.
steps.acceptance_hint: Source status appears in admin.

steps.title: Media asset layer stub
steps.goal: Create a boundary for future sticker and voice assets.
steps.notes: Missing media must degrade to text.
steps.acceptance_hint: Media fallback works.

steps.title: WeChat adapter prototype
steps.goal: Wrap WeChat customer-service style receive/send and media capability.
steps.notes: Current official docs and credentials must be checked before implementation.
steps.acceptance_hint: Adapter can receive/send or simulate receive/send in test.
blockers: Waiting for WeChat API credential and documentation review

steps.title: Observability and audit
steps.goal: Make message failures, safety events, and costs visible.
steps.notes: Admin needs run status and error summary.
steps.acceptance_hint: Error status can be tracked.

steps.title: End-to-end MVP integration
steps.goal: Connect core modules into a runnable inner-test MVP.
steps.notes: After completion, invite user to test core flow.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can run the main chat flow.

steps.title: Prepare test notice
steps.goal: Tell the user what to test and what not to test yet.
steps.notes: Generate only after runnable MVP exists.
steps.acceptance_hint: The user knows testing boundaries.

steps.title: Owner smoke test
steps.goal: Let the owner verify core flows.
steps.notes: Test chat, sticker intent, voice script, memory, and safety mode.
steps.acceptance_hint: Owner completes smoke test.

steps.title: Write UAT scripts
steps.goal: Create nontechnical user test scripts.
steps.notes: Cover scenarios and failure-reporting instructions.
steps.acceptance_hint: Scripts can be shared with inner-test friends.

steps.title: Acceptance checklist
steps.goal: Define first-version pass/fail criteria.
steps.notes: Clarify what passes now and what remains next.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can confirm whether MVP meets the bar.

steps.title: Bug feedback template
steps.goal: Make inner-test issue reports actionable.
steps.notes: Template includes action, expected result, actual result, reproduction, and evidence.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can report issues clearly.

steps.title: Debug next actions
steps.goal: Turn found issues into repair actions.
steps.notes: Enter only after issues appear.
steps.acceptance_hint: Each issue has a next action.

steps.title: Delivery summary
steps.goal: Summarize delivered work and known issues.
steps.notes: Delivery explains source, docs, core flows, and risks.
steps.acceptance_hint: Delivery content is clear.

steps.title: Handoff notes
steps.goal: Record next-iteration guidance and maintenance notes.
steps.notes: Support the next iteration.
steps.acceptance_hint: User can decide the next direction.

artifacts.title: Product intake
artifacts.summary: 项目启动说明，包含项目类型、成熟度、推荐起点和风险。

artifacts.title: Meeting notes
artifacts.summary: 想法输入阶段的结构化会议纪要。

artifacts.title: Product blueprint
artifacts.summary: 已确认的产品定义、用户、场景、价值、流程、MVP 和非目标。

artifacts.title: Decision log
artifacts.summary: 记录人格、场景、用户范围、微信路线和原型查看方式等决策。

artifacts.title: Design spec
artifacts.summary: 确认版设计规格，用于后续原型、架构和任务拆分。

artifacts.title: Project state
artifacts.summary: 机器可读项目状态，作为后续阶段和任务板的来源。

artifacts.title: Public data source manifest
artifacts.summary: 公开样本和 GitHub 项目来源清单，包含许可、用途、流量等级和下载策略。

artifacts.title: Public sample distillation plan
artifacts.summary: 公开样本蒸馏方案，说明来源分层、下载策略、许可处理和输出产物。

artifacts.title: Public sample schema
artifacts.summary: 统一样本结构，用于文本、表情包、短语音和行为标签蒸馏。

artifacts.title: Behavior distillation rules
artifacts.summary: 深夜损友人格的文本、表情包、短语音和安全模式行为规则。

artifacts.title: Synthetic seed behavior examples
artifacts.summary: 项目自有合成样本，用于描述真人感行为，不复制公开数据原文。

artifacts.title: Screen specs
artifacts.summary: Web 静态原型的页面清单、主流程、交互要求和非目标。

artifacts.title: UI preview note
artifacts.summary: 静态原型打开方式和用户确认清单。

artifacts.title: Web static prototype
artifacts.summary: 可直接打开的静态原型，覆盖聊天体验、表情包与语音、用户记忆、样本蒸馏、安全与运行。

artifacts.title: Architecture overview
artifacts.summary: 整体架构说明，覆盖微信入口、AI 编排、多模态、记忆、安全、样本蒸馏和后台。

artifacts.title: Module boundary
artifacts.summary: 模块边界说明，定义每个模块负责什么、不负责什么和测试边界。

artifacts.title: Implementation strategy
artifacts.summary: 实施策略和技术路线决策表，推荐模块化单体 MVP 路线。

artifacts.title: Master task board
artifacts.summary: Full phase and substep board with step counts, statuses, outputs, dependencies, and blockers.

artifacts.title: Progress board
artifacts.summary: Current progress summary showing completed and not-started areas.

artifacts.title: Artifact registry
artifacts.summary: Traceable artifact index linking files to phases and steps.

artifacts.title: Build Round 1 scope
artifacts.summary: Scope for the local companion simulator and admin foundation.

decisions.title: AI personality
decisions.context: 智能体需要有稳定人格，避免像普通客服或问答机器人。

options.label: 毒舌损友型 + 深夜陪伴型

decisions.recommendation_reason: 这个组合最贴近用户想要的吐槽陪伴感。
decisions.notes: 最终人格名暂定为深夜损友。

decisions.title: MVP anchor scenario
decisions.context: 产品可以聊很多内容，但第一版需要一个最能体现价值的主场景。

options.label: 生活压力 + emo + 睡前陪伴

decisions.recommendation_reason: 最适合深夜损友人格，也能自然覆盖其他吐槽场景。

decisions.title: Initial user scope
decisions.context: 用户范围决定是否需要白名单、管理后台和更严格的隔离。

options.label: 一开始公开给很多用户

decisions.recommendation_reason: 少数朋友内测能验证真实使用感，同时避免过早做复杂运营系统。
decisions.notes: 第一版需要内测白名单。

decisions.title: WeChat integration route
decisions.context: 产品要接入微信环境，但不同路线在体验、稳定性和风险上差异很大。

options.label: 企业微信/微信客服式入口
小程序 + 客服/聊天页

decisions.recommendation_reason: MVP 优先稳定和可内测，不选择高封号风险的个人微信自动化。
decisions.notes: 架构阶段需要继续核对当前官方能力。

decisions.title: Prototype review mode
decisions.context: 下一阶段是静态原型确认，用户可以选择是否用浏览器查看视觉原型。

options.label: 使用浏览器可视化原型

decisions.user_decision: 进入 Web 静态原型，把聊天、表情包、语音、管理后台和样本蒸馏状态都做成可看的页面流
decisions.recommendation_reason: 聊天体验和管理后台更适合看原型确认。
decisions.notes: 用户已确认使用可视化静态原型。

decisions.title: Public sample distillation route
decisions.context: 用户认为手动整理私人聊天样本太麻烦，希望使用公开样本和 GitHub 蒸馏项目作为行为来源。

options.label: 用户手动提供私人样本
公开来源 + 合成样本

decisions.user_decision: 确认抓取公开样本，表情包文件等关闭 VPN 后再下载
decisions.recommendation_reason: 能减少用户整理成本，同时降低私人聊天隐私风险。
decisions.notes: 本阶段只抓元数据、来源清单和轻量合成样本，不下载大体积素材。

decisions.title: Multimodal realism scope
decisions.context: 用户希望 AI 能发表情包、语音等，更像真人朋友。

options.label: 立即下载并接入所有表情包和语音素材
先做表情包意图和短语音脚本，素材后接入

decisions.user_decision: 先节省 VPN 流量，等关闭 VPN 后再下载表情包文件
decisions.recommendation_reason: 先把行为逻辑做清楚，避免大文件流量、版权和 API 细节拖慢产品设计。
decisions.notes: 架构阶段继续确认微信媒体能力、素材版权和语音合成路线。

decisions.title: MVP architecture route
decisions.context: 原型已确认，需要选择第一版实现方式，影响开发速度、调试难度和未来扩展。

options.label: 模块化单体 + 后台任务 + 一个数据库

decisions.recommendation_reason: 对你和少数朋友内测来说，这条路线最快、最容易调试，也能保持后续拆分空间。
decisions.notes: User confirmed modular monolith with background worker and one database; project moved to master board confirmation.

decisions.title: Build Round 1 scope
decisions.context: The master task board is confirmed, so the first implementation slice must be confirmed before coding starts.

options.label: Local simulator and admin foundation first

decisions.recommendation_reason: It lets the owner verify the core companion experience before platform credentials, media rights, and voice-provider choices slow the build down.
decisions.notes: Waiting for user confirmation of Build Round 1 scope.
